note: Frozen v2 production baseline for framework.png. This is the bar the v3 all-native Decompiler must match or beat at equal fidelity. All structural numbers are MEASURED from the delivered artifact via work.diagram2ppt.v3.pptx_stats, not copied from prose.

discrepancy.status_doc_claims: STATUS.md / progress notes describe diagram_final.pptx as the v3.3 all-native build with 0 pictures + 402 dots + 12 icons + 6 connectors.
discrepancy.measured_reality: The on-disk diagram_final.pptx (468259 bytes) is byte-identical to diagram_hybrid.pptx and contains 7 PICTURE (raster fallback) shapes, no dot-groups, 6 LINE connectors, 2 charts and 9 OMML runs. The all-native 0-picture build is the separate diagram_v33.pptx (~60 KB).
discrepancy.resolution: This baseline records the measured hybrid delivery as the frozen v2 bar. Whether the 'final' deliverable should be the hybrid (fidelity via faithful crops) or the v3.3 all-native (editability, 0 pictures) is a product decision left to the maintainer; docs should be reconciled to whichever is chosen.
